story: The truth is written in shadows. Only the blind fail to read it.
I didn't break the world... I just removed the illusion that it was whole.
universe: This timeline is fractured. I will be the one to reset it.
You challenge me? A mere echo against the void?
exhibition: Let's see if you're worth remembering.
free_roam: Too much light here... it sickens me.
They walk around, completely unaware of the abyss beneath their feet.
career: My ascension is inevitable. Your defeat is just a footnote.
victory: You were broken before we began.
defeat: I will return from the shadows!

story: Bow before true royalty, or I will break your knees myself.
A queen does not ask for loyalty, she commands it.
universe: This entire domain belongs to me. You are merely trespassing.
I am the crown, the scepter, and the executioner.
free_roam: Where are my guards? This place is filthy.
The air here is thick with mediocrity.
career: The throne is mine. Anyone in my path will be crushed.

story: They left me in the dark! Now they'll see what the dark made me!
I trusted you! And you let me bleed!
universe: Everything spins! The pain never stops!
You can't fix what's already broken into a thousand pieces!
exhibition: I'm gonna tear your face off!
free_roam: Can you hear them? The voices in the walls...
Scratch... scratch... scratch... it never goes away.
career: I'll claw my way to the top! I'll make them all pay!

story: The veil between worlds is thin... I can hear the spirits screaming.
Death isn't the end. It's just a doorway, and I hold the key.
universe: Shadows stretch across the realms... We are all just ghosts waiting to happen.
Your soul is loud. Let me silence it.
free_roam: The spirits are restless tonight.
This place smells like old dust and forgotten promises.
career: I will drag this entire division into the underworld.

story: Bada boom! Realest guy in the room, how you doin'?!
You can't teach this energy! It's electric!
universe: We taking over this whole timeline, straight up!
Ain't nobody on my level, you hear me?
exhibition: I'm about to shock the world!
free_roam: Where the cameras at? I need my close-up!
Lotta haters around here, man. Gotta keep my head on a swivel.
career: Straight to the top, baby! Championship gold is mine!
defeat: Man, the ref was counting too fast!

story: Welcome to the ball pit! Time to get wild!
I don't play by the rules, I break them into tiny pieces!
universe: Howl with me! The moon is high and we are taking over!
Chaos is my middle name, baby!
exhibition: You ready for this wild ride?!
free_roam: Need a tank! Where can I find a tank around here?
Too quiet... let's make some noise!
career: I'm burning rubber all the way to the main event!

story: I move too fast for you to even perceive me! I am the black heart of this business!
You think you can outsmart me? I'm playing chess while you're playing checkers!
universe: This universe moves at my pace! Slow down and you get left behind!
I'm the ultimate puzzle, and you're missing all the pieces!
free_roam: Gotta keep moving. Stagnation is death.
Too slow... everyone is moving so slow.
career: I'm speeding past everyone straight to the gold!

story: You lack discipline, young one... but you also lack the drip! Pimpin' ain't easy, but kung fu is!
Hehe... a wise man once said, keep your pimp hand strong and your chi balanced!
universe: The universe flows like a river of sauce! Can you dig it?
My chi is dripping with swagger!
exhibition: Let me teach you a lesson in style!
Focus your energy... and watch this drip!
free_roam: Ooh, look at that... very nice form, young lady. Hehehe...
Need to meditate... or maybe hit the club. Why not both?
career: I'm taking this dojo all the way to the bank, baby!
victory: A flawless technique! And the suit ain't wrinkled!
defeat: This old master needs a vacation.

story: Listen up, maggot! You are going to respect the chain of command, or I will break you in half!
This isn't a game! This is war! And I am your commanding officer!
universe: I will bring order to this entire chaotic universe, that's an order!
Fall in line!
free_roam: Disgraceful! Look at the posture on these civilians!
I need to inspect the barracks. This place is a mess.
career: I'm marching straight to the top of the ranks!
victory: That's how it's done in the trenches!

story: You're fired! Get out of my building! I made you, and I can destroy you!
I am the boss! What I say goes! This is my empire!
universe: I own this universe! Every single asset belongs to me!
No chance in hell you're taking my company from me!
free_roam: Who approved this decor? Fire them immediately!
Time is money! Move out of my way!
career: I'm running this board and I'm taking the gold!
defeat: My lawyers will hear about this!
You'll never work in this town again!

story: Yeah, I'm out here getting mine, you know what I'm saying? Can't stop the hustle!
All gas, no brakes! We shining on these fools!
universe: Whole universe know my name, man! We global!
Ain't nobody out-hustling me in any dimension.
free_roam: Gotta check the accounts... making moves.
They hating on the drip, I see 'em looking.
career: Championship gold around my waist, that's the ultimate flex!
entrance_taunt: Ice on my neck, ice in my veins.
victory: That's just how we do it on the block.
defeat: Man, they hating on the hustle!
I'll be back on top by tomorrow!

story: I walk the path of the righteous, leaving a trail of broken bones.
universe: My judgment is absolute.
I am the hammer of justice.
free_roam: So much sin in this arena...
I must cleanse this place.
career: I will carry the championship like a holy relic.

story: I fight for those who cannot fight for themselves!
The light of truth will blind you!
universe: A hero's work is never done.
I am the shield of this universe.
exhibition: Let's have a clean, fair match!
free_roam: I should patrol the perimeter.
Always ready to lend a hand.
career: I'll wear this belt as a symbol of hope!

story: Nobody giving me nothing, I gotta take it!
This is a stick up, hands in the air!
universe: I'm robbing everybody in this universe, straight up.
Empty your pockets!
exhibition: I'm leaving with everything you got.
free_roam: Where they keeping the cash around here?
I smell money.
career: I'm stealing the show and the title!

story: The spirits of my ancestors guide my fists.
I fight with the strength of the storm.
universe: This universe has lost its connection to the earth.
I will restore the balance.
free_roam: The wind speaks of a coming battle.
I must center myself.
career: This championship honors my people.

story: Everything has a price, and yours is too low.
I only bet on myself.
universe: This universe is just another casino, and I'm the house.
The odds are always in my favor.
free_roam: Look at these amateurs.
I need a better tailor.
career: The championship looks good with my suit.

story: The mask is my soul. You will never take it.
From the shadows of the ring, I rise.
universe: I am the nightmare you cannot wake from.
Lucha Libre is not a game, it is life and death.
exhibition: Feel the sting of the Black Shadow!
free_roam: [Stares silently from the darkness]
career: I will bring the gold into the darkness.

story: What goes around, comes around... and I'm coming for you.
The universe demands a reckoning.
universe: I am the consequence of every bad choice made in this timeline.
Payback is inevitable.
free_roam: So many guilty consciences walking these halls.
I see the weight of their sins.
career: I'm collecting on every debt owed to me!
entrance_taunt: Your past catches up to you now.

story: Finally... The Boulder has come back!
I'm going to lay the smackdown on your candy ass!
universe: I am the most electrifying man in this entire universe!
Know your role and shut your mouth!
exhibition: Do you smell what The Boulder is cooking?!
free_roam: Look at all these jabronis.
Where's the pie?
career: The Boulder is taking the gold straight to the millions... AND MILLIONS of his fans!

story: AWOOOOO! El Lobo Loco is hungry for the title!
I run with the pack, but I hunt alone!
universe: This universe is my territory! I mark it with victories!
No one tames the crazy wolf!
exhibition: I'm gonna tear you to shreds!
free_roam: *Sniff sniff* I smell fear...
Gotta stay moving, gotta stay wild!
career: The Alpha takes the gold!
defeat: I'll bite back harder next time!

story: I feel nothing. I am the void.
You can't hurt what's already empty.
universe: This universe will eventually succumb to the emptiness. I am just its herald.
Everything fades.
exhibition: I am hollow... make me feel something!
free_roam: It's so cold...
Why am I here?
career: Even a hollow shell can wear a crown of gold.

story: I'm bringing the hammer down!
Welcome to the construction zone!
universe: I'm rebuilding this universe, one broken bone at a time!
Demolition time!
exhibition: I'm clocking in and knocking you out!
free_roam: This place needs a renovation.
Where did I put my hard hat?
career: I'm building a legacy, brick by brick!

story: I see you from all angles at once.
universe: Your form is too traditional, let me break it down.
entrance_taunt: I see you from all angles at once.
victory: Your form is too traditional, let me break it down.

story: Fame is fleeting. Fifteen minutes. Over and over.
universe: Mass production of pain.
entrance_taunt: Fame is fleeting. Fifteen minutes. Over and over.

story: Surreal! The clocks are melting, and so is your face!
universe: I am the dream, you are the nightmare.
entrance_taunt: Surreal! The clocks are melting, and so is your face!
victory: I am the dream, you are the nightmare.

story: My pain is my canvas!
universe: I paint with the blood of my enemies!
victory: I paint with the blood of my enemies!

story: The stars are swirling! Too fast! Too fast!
universe: Yellow! Blue! Violence!
entrance_taunt: The stars are swirling! Too fast! Too fast!

story: Slime season! We sliding on 'em!
universe: Melodies and chaos, you feel me?
victory: Melodies and chaos, you feel me?

story: Turn up! We tearing the roof off!
universe: Loud and proud, baby!
entrance_taunt: Turn up! We tearing the roof off!

story: Talk fast, move faster!
universe: Hype train never stops!
exhibition: Too nasal? Too bad, I'm winning!
